brief: US politics reacts to Senator Lindsey Graham's death, while a deadly Bangkok fire and US-Iran tensions dominate international headlines; research papers focus on visualization and AI applications.
news_summary: Senator Lindsey Graham dies suddenly at 71; at least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire; US and Iran exchange strikes over Strait of Hormuz; McConnell reveals fall led to hospitalization.
papers_summary: Papers explore visual analytics for missing data, AI in crime linkage, brain-computer interfaces in China, and multimodal sign language recognition.

en.brief: US politics reacts to Senator Lindsey Graham's death, while a deadly Bangkok fire and US-Iran tensions dominate international headlines; research papers focus on visualization and AI applications.
en.news_summary: Senator Lindsey Graham dies suddenly at 71; at least 27 killed in Bangkok bar fire; US and Iran exchange strikes over Strait of Hormuz; McConnell reveals fall led to hospitalization.
en.papers_summary: Papers explore visual analytics for missing data, AI in crime linkage, brain-computer interfaces in China, and multimodal sign language recognition.

zh.brief: 今日重点：台风巴威两次登陆浙江，近200万人疏散；韩国僧人举办山林静修相亲活动；同时，国际方面美国参议员林赛·格雷厄姆去世，曼谷酒吧火灾致27人死亡。论文方面，AI犯罪关联分析和中国脑机接口临床试验研究引人关注。
zh.news_summary: 台风巴威一周内两次登陆浙江，当局提前转移人员，渔船拉上岸，近200万人疏散。韩国一座佛寺举办30小时山林静修相亲，帮助12男12女寻找爱情。
zh.papers_summary: 由于无中文论文，英文论文中《How Analysts Use AI in High-Stakes Crime Linkage》和《Clinical Translation of Brain-Computer Interface in China》值得关注，后者聚焦中国脑机接口的临床试验与监管进展。

todays_image.caption: The "HIBERNIA" plate, once part of a fire engine's identity, now echoes the deadly Bangkok bar fire, linking a symbol of firefighting to a tragic scene of uncontrolled flames.
todays_image.title: Fire Engine Plate, "HIBERNIA"
